name: Checkstyle
description: Java code style checker that enforces coding standards and best practices in research software projects, improving code maintainability and readability through automated style analysis.

indicators.Maintainability: measures Maintainability by enforcing consistent coding standards, detecting style violations, and reducing code complexity, thereby improving readability and long-term maintainability of Java codebases.

useCases: Enforce coding standards in Java projects through automated style checks in CI/CD pipelines
Improve readability and maintainability of research software by identifying style violations early
Reduce code review effort by automating detection of formatting and convention issues
Standardize code structure across teams working on collaborative Java projects
